# Contribute To *BloxRealms.io*
  We Appreciate Your Contribution!Please Follow The Guidelines Below:
1. Use The Command Below To Clone The Repo
```bash
gh repo clone Itz-Aaron-Playz-666/BloxRealms.io
```
2. Add This Text To README.md
```markdown
  ## Note
    This Is A Cloned Repo From https://github.com/Itz-Aaron-Playz-666/BloxRealms.io/
```
